summary: Decent recording of an OK show that many fans find smoking and enjoyable
review: Both reviewers rate the performance highly (4–5 stars), with one calling it an “OK” show and the other describing it as “smoking and tripping.” No specific details about song selection, band members, or audio fidelity are provided, so the recording appears to be acceptable but its source and clarity remain unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Two short reviews give an average of 4.5 stars for the performance; lacking any recording comments, a modest rating is applied with low confidence due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention soundboard vs. audience source or any clarity issues; no technical observations were made.

show_quality.setlist_flow: General praise but no specifics; reviewers felt the show was satisfactory overall.
